case_title: BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. VS. CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE $2,581.36 PRINCIPAL, $374.83 INTEREST, $277.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,233.19, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $277.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-2012
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER ADMITTING COPIES INTO EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1033 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO BY MAILED 6-21-12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. SERVED JUN-20-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $68.21 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE
DECLARATION RE: WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IN SUPPORT OF CREDITS/PAYMENT RECEIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,394.84 AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY CAPITAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. DBA ICON ULTRA LOUNGE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 5 INCLUSIVE, ONLY
